name: NexTech Advisors
product: Technology strategy consulting and digital transformation execution for mid-market enterprises
pricing_tier: Project-based: $25k-250k per engagement; retained advisory from $10k/month
value_proposition: Bridge the gap between business strategy and technology execution — delivering measurable digital transformation 3x faster than traditional consultancies through our proprietary AI-assisted delivery model

competitors.name: McKinsey Digital
competitors.weakness: Extremely high cost; slow delivery; junior-heavy teams; reports over working software

competitors.name: Accenture
competitors.weakness: Bureaucratic processes; high staff turnover; vendor lock-in through proprietary frameworks

competitors.name: Netguru
competitors.weakness: Primarily development-focused; limited strategic consulting; smaller transformation track record

target.segment: Mid-market enterprises (€50M-500M revenue) undergoing digital transformation
pain_points: Digital transformation projects take 18-24 months and often fail
Difficulty finding consultants who understand both business and technology
Traditional consultancies deliver reports but not working solutions
Lack of internal technical leadership to guide transformation
Previous consulting engagements produced no measurable ROI

differentiators: AI-assisted delivery model cuts project timelines by 60%
Senior-only team — every client works with 10+ year veterans
Outcome-based pricing tied to measurable KPIs
Dual strength: strategic advisory + hands-on implementation
Deep expertise in manufacturing, retail, and financial services

case_studies.result: Digital transformation roadmap delivered in 8 weeks; first MVP shipped in month 4; 25% efficiency gain in supply chain
Modernized core banking integration layer; reduced time-to-market for new products from 12 months to 6 weeks
Unified commerce strategy across 40 stores + e-commerce; 30% increase in customer lifetime value
